regional_cost_note: Builders in Palmerston North typically charge $60–$80/hr for residential labour, some of the most competitive rates in New Zealand. New builds in Manawatu average $2,200–$2,800/m². Kitchen and bathroom renovations typically run $25,000–$60,000 depending on specification. Busy demand means booking 6–12 weeks ahead is common.
